nasb.text: Your mother was like a vine in your vineyard, Planted by the waters; It was fruitful and full of branches Because of abundant waters.

esv.text: Your mother was like a vine in a vineyard planted by the water, fruitful and full of branches by reason of abundant water.

cnv.text: “‘你的母親像葡萄園裡的一棵葡萄樹， 栽種在水邊； 因為水源充足， 結果纍纍、枝葉茂盛。

ccb.text: “‘你母亲像葡萄园中的一棵葡萄树， 栽在溪水旁， 枝繁叶茂，硕果累累， 因为水源充沛。
